data_policy.purpose: Target-university index for PEIS supervisor data collection.
data_policy.note: This file does not assert individual supervisor eligibility. It only defines target universities and discipline-level metadata to support future verified supervisor records.

hong_kong_target_universities.notes: Faculty of Education target source for future supervisor verification.

mainland_china_education_discipline_b_pl.scope: Mainland China universities with Education discipline evaluation B+ or above.
mainland_china_education_discipline_b_pl.source_standard: Use the Ministry of Education / China Academic Degrees and Graduate Education Development Center discipline evaluation source, plus each university's official education school URL.
